# ATSFy

> ATSFy is a career intelligence platform that decodes how ATS (Applicant Tracking Systems) read, parse, and rank resumes — helping job seekers become visible to machines and chosen by humans.

ATSFy provides AI-powered resume optimization, ATS hiring readiness scoring, career roadmaps, skill gap analysis, role-fit reports, interview coaching, and rejection decoding. It also offers recruiters a bulk candidate screening dashboard.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of ATSFy — career intelligence for the modern job market.
- [Welcome](/welcome): Getting started guide and product tour for new users.
- [Resume Builder](/builder): ATS-friendly resume builder with AI content optimization and template library.
- [ATS Analysis](/ats-analysis): Hiring readiness score, keyword coverage, and prioritized fixes.
- [Career Intelligence](/career-intelligence): 5-module premium engine — roadmap, skills, role-fit, coaching, rejection decoder.
- [Deep Improvement](/deep-improvement): Section-by-section AI improvements and optimization reports.
- [Recruiter](/recruiter): Bulk candidate screening dashboard for hiring teams.
- [Security](/security): Data security, JWT-authenticated edge functions, and 24-hour deletion policy.
- [Privacy](/privacy): Privacy policy and data handling practices.

## Optional

- [Sign In](/auth): Authentication page for job seekers and recruiters.
